personalInfo.name: Mohamed Ali
personalInfo.title: Flutter Developer
personalInfo.description: I build scalable mobile applications using Flutter, Clean Architecture, and modern backend integrations.
personalInfo.about:
Flutter developer with 2+ years of experience building production mobile applications using Flutter.
Experienced with Clean Architecture, MVVM, and Cubit/BLoC.
Built and published multiple mobile apps integrated with Firebase, Supabase, and REST APIs.

services.title: Mobile App Development
services.description: Building high-performance, cross-platform mobile applications using Flutter and Dart with clean architecture.

services.title: API & Backend Integration
services.description: Seamlessly integrating REST APIs, Firebase, and Supabase to provide robust backend solutions and real-time data.

services.title: UI/UX Implementation
services.description: Translating complex designs into beautiful, responsive, and interactive user interfaces with smooth animations.

services.title: App Optimization
services.description: Improving app performance, fixing bugs, and ensuring smooth user experiences through rigorous testing and debugging.

expertiseDetails.title: Problem Solver
expertiseDetails.desc: Turning complex problems into elegant code.

expertiseDetails.title: Performance
expertiseDetails.desc: Optimized apps for smooth 60/120 FPS experience.

projects.title: Mazid Mart
projects.description: Built a production-ready e-commerce mobile application for selling silver products. Integrated authentication, shopping cart, order management, and push notifications.

projects.title: Souq Basmaya
projects.description: Built a production-ready marketplace application for buyers and sellers. Integrated WhatsApp communication between sellers and customers.

projects.title: Daman Care
projects.description: Created a healthcare membership application connecting users with medical providers. Built provider browsing and filtering by governorate.

projects.title: Alamanah Trading
projects.description: Built a full e-commerce platform for selling electrical goods. Integrated WooCommerce REST APIs with WordPress backend.
